title: Alternative Assessment Models (Non‑Multiple Choice)
goal: Assess reasoning and strategy without relying on traditional MCQ formats.

models.name: Answer Elimination
models.description: Students mark which options are clearly wrong before selecting a final answer.
models.benefit: Teaches real test-taking strategy and reasoning instead of guessing.

models.name: Confidence Rating
models.benefit: Builds metacognition and identifies knowledge gaps.

models.name: Ordering Challenge
models.description: Students arrange steps, sentences, or reasoning in correct order.

models.name: Fill the Gap Reasoning
models.description: Students complete a short reasoning step or formula rather than picking an option.

models.name: Spot the Error
models.description: Students examine a worked solution and identify the incorrect step.
models.benefit: Teaches critical thinking and debugging skills.
